title: 70-lesson milestone
text: Five lessons remain. You can type 93 words per minute on dense school content — most adults can't. The final, at lesson 75, is a tournament-style mixed-content paragraph. Stay sharp, stay accurate, finish strong.

tips.text: 93 WPM on school content = elite teen

tips.target: Five lessons remain. You can type 93 words per minute on dense school content — most adults
can't. The final, at lesson 75, is a tournament-style mixed-content paragraph. Stay sharp, stay accurate, finish strong.

character_tips.anna: 🎯 93 WPM. Five lessons left. Don't peak early — hold steady.
character_tips.maxim: 70 in. Five to finish. Hold the gain.
character_tips.klavochka: Five steps to your crown, my hero ⭐
